message:
feat(dashboard): add Tailscale authentication middleware

Add AuthMiddleware that identifies users via Tailscale's WhoIs API.
When no Tailscale client is available or WhoIs fails, users are
treated as "anonymous".

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
